source.code:
@jordan.respect -= 3


// ── Intent: flirt (variant outcomes — volition matters a lot) ───────────────
"The compliment lands — @jordan looks genuinely surprised, the good kind"

value: looks genuinely surprised, the good kind

source.code: '@jordan listens without interrupting, then quietly: "I get that"'

value: listens without interrupting, then quietly: "I get that"

source.code: "@jordan absorbs it quietly. They didn't ask for this much, this fast."

value: absorbs it quietly. They didn't ask for this much, this fast.

source.code: "The line lands — @jordan actually laughs, a short surprised sound"

value: actually laughs, a short surprised sound

source.code: "@jordan's expression does something careful, a half-smile that keeps @alex at arm's length"

value: 's expression does something careful, a half-smile that keeps

source.code: "The line lands and @jordan looks away first — there's color in their face"

value: looks away first — there's color in their face

source.code: 'There is barely a pause. @jordan tilts their head: "I was kind of thinking about that too"'

value: tilts their head: "I was kind of thinking about that too"

source.code: '@jordan looks caught off guard. "Maybe sometime," they say. Not a yes.'

value: looks caught off guard. "Maybe sometime," they say. Not a yes.

source.code: "@alex asks @jordan if they want to grab food sometime"

value: if they want to grab food sometime

source.code: "@jordan changes the subject — gracefully, but it's a wall going up."

value: changes the subject — gracefully, but it's a wall going up.

source.code: '@jordan touches their own hair — small, unconscious. "This isnt as bad as I thought."'

value: touches their own hair — small, unconscious. "This isnt as bad as I thought."

source.code: "@jordan's expression goes careful. They glance at their phone like they just remembered something."

value: 's expression goes careful. They glance at their phone like they just remembered something.

source.code: "@jordan glances at @alex once, then twice. When they look away there's color in their face."

value: once, then twice. When they look away there's color in their face.

source.code: "@jordan asks a pointed question — testing whether @alex is paying attention or just performing."

value: asks a pointed question — testing whether
is paying attention or just performing.

source.code: "@jordan relaxes — just a little. But @alex notices."
"Jordan is at their locker. Word in the hallway is something went sideways with someone last month."

value: Jordan is at their locker. Word in the hallway is something went sideways with someone last month.

source.code: "Jordan is at their locker, glancing over at @alex twice already this morning."
